nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Spec Kit coding-agent-context extension explaining how it manages the CLAUDE.md (or equivalent) instruction file, its configurable markers, available commands, and how to disable it.

nodes.name: agent-context-config.yml
nodes.summary: Runtime configuration for the agent-context extension specifying the target context file (CLAUDE.md) and the start/end delimiter markers used to demarcate the Spec Kit managed section.

nodes.name: extension.yml
nodes.summary: Extension manifest for the agent-context Spec Kit extension, declaring its provided commands (speckit.agent-context.update), lifecycle hooks (after_specify, after_plan), metadata, and version requirements.
